notes.method: Average from public tariff pages when explicit EUR/kWh values are found; previous values are kept otherwise.
notes.public_mixed: Weighted approximation from AC/DC/HPC where available; not an official national price index.
notes.tesla_supercharger_owner: Tesla prices can vary by station and time; parsed values are best-effort from public pages if available.
